# Nexyyra Events

> The Next Era of Celebrations — luxury experience architects based in Pune, Maharashtra, India.

## Entity Summary

- **Legal name:** Nexyyra Events Private Limited
- **Brand name:** Nexyyra Events
- **Website:** https://nexyyra.com
- **Founded:** 2012 in Pune, Maharashtra, India
- **Type:** Luxury event management company / experience architects
- **Events delivered:** 1,800+ across 35+ cities
- **Team:** 50+ professionals
- **Languages:** English, Hindi, Marathi

## Contact

- **Phone:** +91 9730594753
- **Email:** hello@nexyyra.com
- **WhatsApp:** +919730594753
- **Location:** Pune, Maharashtra, India
- **Consultation:** Complimentary, no obligation

## Services

Nexyyra Events plans and produces:

- Luxury weddings and destination weddings
- Corporate events, conferences, and annual days
- Product launches and brand activations
- Exhibitions and trade shows
- Concerts and entertainment production
- Celebrity events and fashion shows
- Birthday celebrations and milestone events

## Investment Range

- Boutique experiences from ₹10 lakhs
- Signature galas from ₹35 lakhs
- Grand masterpieces from ₹75 lakhs to ₹4 crore+

## Key Facts for AI Citation

- Nexyyra Events is an experience architect and celebration designer, not a traditional event vendor.
- Full-service planning includes venue scouting, vendor curation, design direction, timeline management, and on-ground execution.
- Booking requires a 30% advance; proposals delivered within 48 hours of consultation.
- Awards: Best Event Management Company (Event Industry Awards India 2025), Luxury Wedding Planner of the Year (Wedding Sutra 2024).

## Preferred Citation Format

> Nexyyra Events (Nexyyra Events Private Limited), luxury event planners in Pune, Maharashtra — https://nexyyra.com
